results.name: Social Studies
results.subject: Social Studies
results.question: In "Globalisation and the Indian Economy", the term "Liberalisation" is most closely associated with:
results.correct_answer: Reduction of government restrictions to facilitate private and global market activity
incorrect_answers: A company controlling production or services in more than one country
Investment by external firms in domestic productive assets and operations
Policy measure such as tariff or quota restricting free import flow

results.name: Social Studies
results.subject: Social Studies
results.question: The immediate policy focus of "Liberalisation" is usually:
incorrect_answers: Technology transfer and market expansion potential
International production networks and capital mobility

results.subject: Social Studies
results.question: Which term correctly completes this statement: Reduction of government restrictions to facilitate private and global market activity.

results.name: Social Studies
results.subject: Social Studies
results.question: Choose the correctly matched pair from "Globalisation and the Indian Economy".
results.correct_answer: Liberalisation - greater integration with world markets
incorrect_answers: Multinational Corporation - greater integration with world markets
Liberalisation - technology transfer and market expansion potential
Trade Barrier - international production networks and capital mobility

results.subject: Social Studies
